name: Rock Holmes
description: Rock is a recurrent character in Osamu Tezuka's manga series, and he is an important part of Osamu Tezuka's Star System. Rock is a young boy with shiny dark hair. He first appeared in the manga series Detective Boy Rock Holmes, as a child detective. While most of other Tezuka child characters stayed the same age, Rock grew up throughout the years and his character was reused for more mature "roles" in Tezuka's manga, where he gradually developed a darker personality. name: Rufus Albarea
nativeName: ルーファス・アルバレア
description: Rufus Albarea is introduced as the oldest son of Duke Helmut Albarea, head of one of the Four Great Houses, and half brother to Jusis Albarea. ~!He is the very first member of the Ironblood, handpicked individual by Chancellor Osborne to act his right-hand man!~ ~!In Hajimari no Kiseki, Rufus takes up the role of the masked terrorist 'C' and begins commanding the Reborn Imperial Liberation Front in an effort to find the true identity of the Rufus in Crossbell!~

name: Sensei
description: A teacher with a strange affinity for military tactics, Sensei is the advisor for SCHALE. With the help of Arona and the students of various academies, Sensei keeps the peace in Kivotos while getting into wacky antics with the city's students, guiding them to be better while getting closer to them. In-game, Sensei is the player's self-insert character, allowing the player to imagine their sex or any appearance they want for themselves.

name: Shiori
description: __Race:__ Beast __Height:__ 153 cm Shiori is a calm and reserved girl. She has a condition that leaves her rather sickly and staying at The Farm helps her condition with its outdoor atmosphere. She is the younger sister of [Hatsune Kashiwazaki](https://anilist.co/character/169507/Hatsune) and a member of the guild 'Elizabeth Park', she also likes reading and strolling.
mediaTitles: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia
searchTerms: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia

name: Shizuku Kusano
description: A junior college student with little experience about camping alone. Shizuku got super interested in camping after trying to camp with friends for the first time. She decided to make Gen her mentor to develop her skills on camping alone, by contradictorily, camping together until she is able to manage on her own. She has a knack for cooking. Shizuku sometimes speaks in a heavy Kyushu dialect. She has an older brother.

name: Skuld
description: Skuld is Belldandy's younger sister and is the third Goddess to appear to Keiichi Morisato. Skuld has a Goddess second class, type one, limited license, a category similar to her eldest sister Urd. Her true age is unknown, but her appearance is that of a girl in her early teens. And even though she is a goddess, she is afraid of ghosts. Skuld is one of Yggdrasil's system debuggers. She compensates for her lack of magic power with her innate talent for invention which is known throughout Heaven.
mediaTitles: Oh! My Goddess: Flights of Fancy
searchTerms: Oh! My Goddess: Flights of Fancy

name: Soujirou
description: An all-powerful master swordsman from another world. In addition to his skill with the blade, he possesses superhuman intuition, granting him the ability to discern, through a single glance, the perfect way to kill any enemy who appears before him.

name: Stitch
description: Stitch is an alien from outer space, one day ends up falling to an island located on Earth, called Izayoi. He discovers "The Spiritual Stone" on Okinawa and learns it can grant his wish of becoming the strongest in the universe...provided he does enough good deeds.

name: Subaru
description: Class: Heavy axeman Real name: Mariko Misono Subaru is a female Heavy Axeman introduced as the leader of the Crimson Knights, a player organization designed to fight injustice in The World. At times she seems to be the only character preventing the Crimson Knights from running wild; she knows that they must restrain from abusing their power. She eventually joins in the search of a way to help Tsukasa, and builds a strong relationship with him. ~!In the real world Subaru is restricted to a wheelc

name: Sugar
description: Sugar is a special officer of the Donquixote Pirates' Trebol Army. She was one of the most integral components of Doflamingo's plan in keeping Dressrosa in line, as any dissenters were turned into toys by her Hobi Hobi no Mi powers. She is also the younger sister of Monet. Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc. (Source: One Piece Wikia)
mediaTitles: One Piece - Episode of Sabo: Bond of Three Brothers - A Miraculous Reunion and an Inherited Will
searchTerms: One Piece - Episode of Sabo: Bond of Three Brothers - A Miraculous Reunion and an Inherited Will

name: Syoko Hoshi
description: **Height:** 142 cm **Hometown:** Fukushima Syoko is an introverted girl with a passion for mushrooms (which also includes growing them). She is also awkward and lacks communication skills, and often stutters when talking. She only became an idol after being coerced into going to an audition to find less conventional idols by the Producer. However, her personality changes radically once she turns into an idol. After training, she sports a total makeover, adopting a death metal look and becoming u

name: Tadase Hotori
description: **Height:** 154 cm A kind-hearted and mature boy the same age as Amu who serves as the K-Chair (King's Chair). His alias is "Prince", as he is a bishounen, and he is Amu's love interest. Whenever he is called "Prince," his character changes into a violent, egotistical king who wishes to rule the world. Because of this, he does not do Character Change with Kiseki unless it is absolutely necessary. Actually, he too is a shy person and is not a public speaker. Because of this, he wished to become a

name: Tae-Jun Oh
description: Right hand man of Jason Kim, K35's (Korean Gang Organization) second in command. He has no criminal record. His family died in a car crash when he was 10 years old. He has seventeen tattoos, a scar on his face and a surgical scar on his lower abdomen. He competed at illegal martial arts tournaments in the past.

name: Tama Inubouzaki
description: A slightly shy and nervous girl, allied with Ruler. She wears a dog costume, complete with large paw gloves as her Magical Girl outfit. Her ability allows her to create a hole, up to 1m in diameter and 5m in depth, on any surface. While she is less competent than her other teammates in Ruler's team, she was happy just to be able to enter the team. ~!Her throat is sliced open by Swim Swim after she finds out her identity as a magical girl. She is the thirteenth death.!~

name: Tapioca
description: Tapioca is Akira's buddy duck.

name: Teitoku Kakine
description: He is one of the seven Level 5 espers, ranking second after Accelerator and is the leader of SCHOOL, one of the many underground factions. His power is production of the Dark Matter, the substance which isn't supposed to exist in this world, which makes him the opposite of Accelerator who specializes in destruction. He shares a rivalry with Mugino Shizuri, team leader of ITEM and the number #4 Level 5 esper 'Meltdowner'. He strives to become the strongest, even if it means to kill off Accelerato

name: The Laughing Man
description: The Laughing Man proves to be the ultimate hacker, capable of such feats as hijacking multiple video streams simultaneously, taking over someone's cybernetic brain entirely, or even editing his own images out of someone's cybernetic eyes, and all in real time. name: Tom
description: Tom was a powerful long-horned cowfish Fishman, known as the most skilled shipwright in the world. He was also the teacher of Iceburg and Franky. (Source: One Piece Wiki)
mediaTitles: ONE PIECE FILM: STRONG WORLD - EPISODE:0
searchTerms: ONE PIECE FILM: STRONG WORLD - EPISODE:0

name: Wario
description: Wario is Mario's opposite with W on his hat. He was first introduced in the 1992 game "Super Mario Land 2: 6 Golden Coins" as the main antagonist. He soon thereafter became the main protagonist of the sequel game, "Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3". He has since became the face of his own series' such as "WarioWare" and "Wario Land". He is now a reoccurring character in all Mario Spin-off games such as Mario Golf, Mario Tennis, Mario Party, etc.

name: Wolf Bete
description: **Height:** 151 cm One of Agastia's latest monsters, a wolfman whose body was abruptly changed to a wolfgirl before completion, after Akashic demanded Bete be "cuter." After surviving their initial battle with Blader, Bete was transferred into the Monster Development Department as another assistant.
mediaTitles: Miss KUROITSU from the Monster Development Department
searchTerms: Miss KUROITSU from the Monster Development Department

name: Xuan He
description: __Height:__ 189 cm He Xuan is a ghost of Supreme rank and one of the Four Great Calamities. He bears the title Black Water Submerging Boats and his domain is the Black Water Demon Lair.

name: Yamatonokami Yasusada
description: A uchigatana said to have been wielded by Okita Souji of the Shinsengumi. Much like [Kashuu Kiyomitsu](https://anilist.co/character/121631/Kashuu-Kiyomitsu), it is a difficult blade to handle—one that chooses its wielder. For this reason, it is said to have been relatively inexpensive. At first glance, he appears unassuming; yet, when it comes to combat...
